text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
I hope everyone finished their homework. I'm
collecting it now!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
(...Well, I actually did it this time. Get ready to be
astounded by my genius—)

text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text:
How about you, Sweep? If you didn't do it this
time, you'll need to take an extra class.

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text: I was just about to give it to you!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
But now that you said that, I'm not gonna! And
I'm not going to any extra classes either! Hmph!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sweep Tosho brings her foul mood to training,
and it ends up being quite a disaster.
